payload.title: [MEDIUM] Cloud-interim path has no rate limiting or connection ceiling
payload.description: rateLimitMiddleware + SSE tracker are mounted only inside `if (hostedAuth)` (server.js:241). fly.toml ships SCOPE_CLOUD=1 and documents a Milestone-A state (no SCOPE_PG_URL) = cloud + shared token with NO rate limiting on any path, internet-facing. FIX: gate the limiter/connection cap on `cloud`, keyed on token-hash/IP in interim mode.
